{#- Override of shibuya/components/copy-page-button.html. The stock template routes "Copy page" / "View Source" at the GitHub source file. We route: * "Copy page" at the sphinx-llm .html.md output (when present), so it yields clean rendered Markdown for every page including .ipynb guides. Falls back to a file:// guard alert if the .html.md is missing. * "View as Markdown" at the Sphinx-native _sources/ for text-based sources (.md/.rst), which Sphinx always copies during the build. For .ipynb sources the raw _sources copy is notebook JSON, so we fall back to the sphinx-llm rendered .html.md instead. The Markdown icon is loaded from _static/icons/ instead of so it renders without a network fetch to api.iconify.design (which is blocked on some deployments). Copy feedback and the file:// guard live in _static/copy-page-button.js. -#} {%- set _show_ai_links = theme_show_ai_links and not (meta and meta.hide_ai_links) -%} {%- set _md_url = pagename.rsplit('/', 1)[-1] ~ '.html.md' -%} {%- set _view_md_url = _md_url if '.ipynb' in sourcename else pathto('_sources/' ~ sourcename, 1) -%} {%- if _show_ai_links -%}
{{ _('View as Markdown') }}
{%- endif -%}
